calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg, via Zoom, for Jewish Family and Children's Services, Trustee.

The court advises Ms. Friedberg of its tentative ruling to reduce the request for extraordinary fees and modify a few other requests, specifically regarding special administrator fees. The court also queries Ms. Friedeberg regarding the request for fees for three attorneys and four paralegals. Ms. Friedeberg offers advocacy regarding the fee requests and regarding the number of attorneys and paralegals specifically, having a Cantonese speaking attorney assist with communicating with related parties.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Jun-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 24, 2018 is admitted to probate. Jewish Family and Children's Services is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
